stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review Go team handles case 1721 during a malformed HTML and parser differential clinic. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove streaming JSON, CSV dialect, deterministic order, accessible HTML, and remediation lineage; every body, file, timer, transport, goroutine, channel, collector, and browser-service request needs one owner; then change one tokenizer, goquery, selector, domain constructor, record, link, frontier, or trap case and retain rejected evidence. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Link finding evidence, owner, severity rationale, status, exception expiry, correction, retest, changed page, and stakeholder outcome.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Removing a finding row is enough remediation history.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Link finding evidence, owner, severity rationale, status, exception expiry, correction, retest, changed page, and stakeholder outcome. Artifact under review: deterministic accessible report suite.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner permission, revision, URL and robots policy, body and parser limits, record and graph provenance, frontier and goroutine ownership, Colly differences, changed fixtures, privacy, accessibility, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as Go crawler proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Remediation Lineage, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Link finding evidence, owner, severity rationale, status, exception expiry, correction, retest, changed page, and stakeholder outcome.

steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Authorized site auditing and Go Record what required effort · Review Remediation Lineage, keep Remediation Lineage connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Link finding evidence, owner, severity rationale, status, exception expiry, correction, retest, changed page, and stakeholder outcome.
